{"code":"import json, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

reviews = pd.DataFrame(var_call_6KVS6UxypOePlC0M1mrKCPQ4)

# Filter English-language Literature & Fiction books
mask_english = books['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)
mask_lit = books['categories'].str.contains('Literature & Fiction', case=False, na=False)
eng_lit_books = books[mask_english & mask_lit].copy()

# Fuzzy join on id suffix number: assume purchase_id like 'purchaseid_123' and book_id like 'bookid_123'
reviews['id_num'] = reviews['purchase_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$').astype(int)
eng_lit_books['id_num'] = eng_lit_books['book_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$').astype(int)

merged = eng_lit_books.merge(reviews[['id_num','avg_rating']], on='id_num', how='inner')

result_cols = ['book_id','title','author','rating_number','categories','details','avg_rating']
result = merged[result_cols].sort_values('book_id').to_dict(orient='records')

out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)"}

{"code":"import json, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

reviews = pd.DataFrame(var_call_6KVS6UxypOePlC0M1mrKCPQ4)
books_path = Path(var_call_Oh7qrXM02qrJzDc9aFEuZpCy)
books = pd.read_json(books_path)

# Filter English-language Literature & Fiction books
mask_english = books['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)
mask_lit = books['categories'].str.contains('Literature & Fiction', case=False, na=False)
eng_lit_books = books[mask_english & mask_lit].copy()

# Fuzzy join on id suffix number: assume purchase_id like 'purchaseid_123' and book_id like 'bookid_123'
reviews['id_num'] = reviews['purchase_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$').astype(int)
eng_lit_books['id_num'] = eng_lit_books['book_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$').astype(int)

merged = eng_lit_books.merge(reviews[['id_num','avg_rating']], on='id_num', how='inner')

result_cols = ['book_id','title','author','rating_number','categories','details','avg_rating']
result = merged[result_cols].sort_values('book_id').to_dict(orient='records')

out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)"}
